name: Crab Souffle Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 15-1/2 x 10-1/2 x 1-inch pan. Line with waxed paper, greasing lightly and flouring.
2. Heat butter in a saucepan until melted, remove from heat.
3. Stir in flour until smooth. Cook over low heat, stirring until the mixture is smooth and bubbly.
4. Remove from heat and stir in milk. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly.
5. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat. Stir in egg yolks one at a time.
6. Add salt, red pepper, chives, and Parmesan cheese. Let cool at room temperature; cover to prevent a film from forming.
7. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
8. Beat egg whites with cream of tartar until stiff but not dry.
9. Gently fold in one-third of the whites into the batter, then fold in the remaining whites.
10. Bake for 35-45 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown.
11. Loosen the souffle from the edges of the pan and invert onto a cloth-covered cooling rack.
12. Spread with crab meat filling. Roll from the narrow end; cut desired slices when cool.
13. Cook green onions in butter until tender. Stir in remaining ingredients and heat until hot.
